### Post by battleshipterry on 2008-04-14
Every time I log in In Ubuntu 7.10 my line in audio is hissing I have a ATI tv card and it uses line in for sound. if I start the TV Card the sound clears up .does anyone Know how to mute the Line in on boot up. I can mute it in sound property's but when I reboot it unmutes again.

I posted my Xorg below may not be necessary.

### Post by smurphy_it on 2008-04-16
I belive it is accomplished by going into a terminal, going into alsamixer, muting the Line-in.  Then hit escape.

You then do a alsactl --store

Then add an entry into session (under system menu) with the command being alsactl --restore

Logout, and back in (might take a reset, not sure) and that should clear up your problem.

---

### Post by battleshipterry on 2008-04-16
Thanks I got it working right.

---
